record.field:
sql = """ CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION caching_get_sw_params(p_website_id INTEGER) RETURNS TABLE(quota_mb INTEGER, invalidation_version INTEGER) AS $$ BEGIN RETURN QUERY SELECT COALESCE(w.caching_safe_quota_mb, 35) as quota_mb, COALESCE(w.caching_invalidation_version, 1) as invalidation_version FROM website w WHERE w.id = p_website_id;
IF NOT FOUND THEN RETURN QUERY SELECT 35, 1; END IF; END; $$ LANGUAGE plpgsql; """ env.cr.execute(sql)
